name: fable5-codex
description: Fable-5 evidence-first GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra workflows for Codex with ECF run contracts and real subagent orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Sol Ultra evidence-first multi-agent workflows for serious codebase work.
interface.longDescription: Fable-5 for Codex provides GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra-ready skills for audits, deep reviews, fact checks, codebase understanding, design options, and repo-wide sweeps. Each workflow emphasizes ECF-style run contracts, source-grounded mapping, parallel independent lenses, verified findings, rejected-candidate preservation, coverage notes, explicit unknowns, and honest Workflow Traces for real subagent use.
defaultPrompt: With GPT-5.6 Sol + Ultra selected, use $fable-audit with real subagents and an ECF run contract on this repo.
Use $fable-understand with an ECF run contract to explain boot flow.
